metadata.name: Blevins Phonology I — Universal Feature Set
metadata.citation: Blevins, J. (2025). Phonology I course notes. Feature table compiled from Blevins (2025) Table 1 & Table 2.

notes.convention: Values: '+' present, '-' absent, '0' inapplicable. Italic features (approximant, delayed_release, front, labiodental, tap, trill) should be used only when absolutely necessary per Blevins (2025). Table 2 features (long, stress, tone, upper_register) are prosodic/autosegmental and not strictly segmental.
